name: test_save_search_validations
description:
Test Case:
TUU-T796 - Save Search – Unique Name / Blank Name / Special Characters

Objective:
Verify that:
1. User can save search with unique name
2. Blank search name validation appears
3. Special character validation works correctly

Expected:
1. New tab saved successfully
2. Validation shown for blank name
3. Validation shown or special chars sanitized

Test Case:
TUU-T796 - Save Search – Unique Name / Blank Name / Special Characters

Objective:
Verify that:

  1. User can save search with unique name
  2. Blank search name validation appears
  3. Special character validation works correctly

Expected:

  1. New tab saved successfully
  2. Validation shown for blank name
  3. Validation shown or special chars sanitized

page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/'>

    def test_save_search_validations(page: Page):
        """
        Test Case:
        TUU-T796 - Save Search – Unique Name / Blank Name / Special Characters
    
        Objective:
        Verify that:
        1. User can save search with unique name
        2. Blank search name validation appears
        3. Special character validation works correctly
    
        Expected:
        1. New tab saved successfully
        2. Validation shown for blank name
        3. Validation shown or special chars sanitized
        """
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 1: Navigate to Login Page
        # ==========================================================
        page.goto(
            "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
        )
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 2: Login to Application
        # ==========================================================
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill("CSASINHN")
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill("GOLD950")
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 3: Navigate to Orders List
        # ==========================================================
        orders_menu = page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(orders_menu).to_be_visible()
    
        orders_menu.click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 4: Open Date Filter
        # ==========================================================
        column_name = "Order Date"
    
        header = page.get_by_role("columnheader", name=column_name)
        header.scroll_into_view_if_needed()
        header.hover()
    
        filter_icon = header.locator(".ag-icon-filter")
        filter_icon.click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 5: Apply Date Filter
        # ==========================================================
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="From"
        ).click()
